$description: Derived from component CSS + doc page — do not edit by hand; regenerate with `node scripts/build-component-api.mjs`.
name: radio-button
title: Radio Button

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Focus halo is now keyboard-only (:has(:focus-visible) replaces :focus-within) so it no longer lingers after a mouse click selects the radio.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Added Figma ↔ code mapping (props) table to the Variants section — properties, values, and defaults sourced from the Stardust Components Figma library.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Component CSS extracted to shared assets/css/components/radio-button.css; focus/secondary halo references updated to grey-800 (WCAG 2.4.11, resolved 2026-06-11); anatomy rebuilt as deconstructed stack with hover highlighting.

changelog.author: Mason
changelog.change: Initial component page — 5 Figma states, MD3-aligned motion (Standard / Standard Accelerate easing, asymmetric halo timing, dot scale animation, press squeeze), focus tokens from Checkbox v1.1.0 (colour/focus/primary / colour/focus/secondary), full keyboard / ARIA radiogroup contract, Phase 4 hover/pressed tokens documented. Produced via the component workshop workflow (Review → Spec → Sandbox → Build).
